content: Autonomous curiosity-driven intrinsic reward mechanisms (from ICM-equipped agents) can be repurposed to dynamically prioritize which new experiences to encode into an active learning agent’s long-term memory, solving the 2024-2025 SOTA open challenge of scaling memory without storing redundant or low-value data. This creates a self-tuning memory system that grows only with information that advances the agent’s existing knowledge, rather than requiring manual labeling or static memory pruning rules.
